skill_creation_review.existing_skill_review: Reviewed current skills before adding codex-ssh-hostinger-coolify-setup-maintainer: n8n-local-setup for local and hosted n8n guide ownership, self-hosted-service-safety for non-n8n self-hosting safety boundaries, secure-cicd-installer for deployment-adjacent approval gates, ai-coding-agent-rules routing, README skill tables, and the skill safety matrix. The new codex-ssh-hostinger-coolify-setup-maintainer skill is distinct because it pairs a production-sensitive Hostinger/Coolify maintainer workflow with source-owned checklists, templates, scripts, agent metadata, and owner approval gates while leaving n8n-local-setup's n8n-specific Hostinger Coolify VPS deployment reference intact.
skill_creation_review.trigger: Use codex-ssh-hostinger-coolify-setup-maintainer when a user asks Codex to help set up Hostinger for deployment, prepare a Hostinger VPS, inspect a Hostinger server over SSH, bootstrap or maintain Coolify, deploy apps through Coolify, run daily security checks, or respond to incidents on a Hostinger VPS running Coolify. Do not invoke it for generic local n8n setup, n8n app deployment inside an already-running Coolify platform, or generic app coding with no Hostinger/Coolify work.
skill_creation_review.decision_reason: The previous Hostinger/Coolify material is now a dedicated production-sensitive maintainer workflow rather than secondary n8n-local setup guidance or a repo-preparation-only guide.
skill_creation_review.unique_value: Combines Codex SSH read-only preflight, owner approval gates, setup/deploy/maintenance/incident checklists, evidence templates, and a daily security report script for Hostinger VPS plus Coolify owners.
skill_creation_review.runtime_footprint: SKILL.md stays concise and routes to a local reference only when full runbook detail matters. The long runtime guide is published as a reference file, not duplicated in the default entrypoint.
skill_creation_review.local_assets: Full local reference guide, concise skill README, SKILL.md, agents/openai.yaml metadata, checklists, evidence templates, rollback/approval templates, read-only daily security report script, and systemd timer installer script. The scripts perform reporting/installation only and do not perform auto-remediation.
skill_creation_review.output_contract: Return an evidence-based PASS/WARN/FAIL setup, deploy, security check, maintenance, or incident report with owner approvals, blockers, manual follow-up, and confirmation that no secrets were printed and no unapproved live production actions were performed.
skill_creation_review.anti_bloat_review: The skill is not generic DevOps advice: it triggers only for Hostinger VPS plus Coolify setup, deployment, security checks, maintenance, and incident response. It routes longer instructions to local references/checklists and excludes unapproved live production operations.
skill_creation_review.safety_boundary: Agent-safe by default for read-only inspection, evidence reports, placeholder-only documentation, and the bundled read-only daily security report. Hostinger, Coolify, GitHub connection, DNS/TLS, real secrets, production deployments, migrations, backups, restore tests, cutover, rollback, VPS changes, billing, customer data, firewall restrictions, reboots, and destructive actions are human-owned and approval-gated.
skill_creation_review.third_party_audit: not_applicable_first_party; no third-party text or code copied or adapted. Vendor docs were consulted only as factual context.
skill_creation_review.publisher_workflow: context-preserving-ai-publisher source-to-surface workflow with first-party _main source, deterministic copy outputs, curated reference index, routing updates, safety matrix updates, sync, and validation.
skill_creation_review.routing: codex-ssh-hostinger-coolify-setup-maintainer is routed for Hostinger VPS plus Coolify setup, deployment, security checks, maintenance, incident response, and prompts such as helping set up Hostinger for deployment. n8n-local-setup keeps its local n8n and n8n-specific Hostinger Coolify VPS deployment reference material for use after Coolify exists. If the target app is n8n or the task touches live n8n operations, n8n-agent-rules remains the companion safety router.
